'''Orlean''' was a vehicle manufacturing company in operation during the early years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], at a time when the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] was known to be unreliable.

Orlean was the manufacturer of the [[Star Cab]].
